description: Use this API to add an individual generation reactive capability data record to the working case. It may also be used to modify an existing generation reactive capability data record. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_gen_rcap_indv(eibus, genid, rcstat, realar)

parameters.name: rcstat
parameters.description: Reactive capability limit status. (input; 4 by default).

rcstat.description: in service, no reactive generation limits.
in service, apply reactive generation limits.

realar.description: direct-axis synchronous reactance in pu on Mbase (default of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise).
stator current limit in pu on Mbase (default of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise).
rated lagging power factor (default of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise).
rated leading power factor (default of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise).
maximum reactive absorption in pu on Mbase (default of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise).

error_codes.description: generator reactive capability data table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
non-fatal error occurred. Possible warning messages are: - Invalid reactive capability status specified.
